meaning: v.误用,错用,滥用,虐待n.误用,错用,滥用,误用之实例
examples: The new law toughens up penalties for those that misuse guns.
He was eventually convicted for the misuse of official funds.
Misuse of a fire extinguisher will result in fines.
Mr Starmer decided there was "insufficient evidence" to support a UK prosecution under the Computer Misuse Act.
The Internal Revenue Code prohibits the IRS's misuse or improper disclosure of taxpayer information.
